# discord_emoji (Resource)

Manages a custom emoji within a Discord guild.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# image_data_uri is a write-only base64 data URI; load it from a local file.
data "discord_local_image" "logo" {
  path = "${path.module}/logo.png"
}

resource "discord_emoji" "logo" {
  server_id      = "123456789012345678"
  name           = "company_logo"
  image_data_uri = data.discord_local_image.logo.data_uri
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Emoji name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `image_data_uri` (String) Base64 image data URI for the emoji. Write-only: applied at creation and not refreshed from the API.
- `roles` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the roles allowed to use this emoji.

### Read-Only

- `animated` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is animated.
- `available` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is available for use (may be false if the guild lost boosts).
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the emoji.
